headlines.title: Cerebras Systems (CBRS) Teams Up With CrowdStrike To Push AI Cybersecurity
headlines.summary: Cerebras Systems (NasdaqGS:CBRS) and CrowdStrike announced a partnership to combine Cerebras AI accelerator hardware with the CrowdStrike Falcon AI cybersecurity platform. The alliance includes CrowdStrike using Cerebras chips for its core security offering, while Cerebras adopts Falcon AI to protect its own infrastructure. The collaboration focuses on real-time, AI-driven enterprise security, targeting growing demand in cybersecurity workloads.

headlines.title: Cerebras Scores With CrowdStrike Deal: What it Means for Investors
headlines.summary: CBRS' CrowdStrike pact brings wafer-scale AI inference to real-time cyber defense, widening its enterprise reach as cloud growth accelerates.

headlines.title: Prediction: 1 Reason Palantir Could Keep Beating the Market
headlines.summary: Palantir has been crushed year to date while the S&P 500 climbs, yet a single performance metric shared by only three other companies in the world suggests the selloff may be creating a rare opportunity.

headlines.title: CrowdStrike Just Became Wall Street's Newest Stock-Split Stock, but Something More "Magnificent" May Be Next
headlines.summary: The stars are aligning for a special member of the "Magnificent Seven" to become the next blockbuster stock split.

headlines.title: CrowdStrike partners with Cerebras to accelerate AI security response
headlines.summary: The partnership targets AI-driven threats by enabling security systems to respond as quickly as the latest automated attacks.

description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. provides cybersecurity solutions in the United States and internationally. Its unified platform provides cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity, and data through a software as a service (SaaS) subscription-based model. The company offers corporate endpoint and cloud workload security, managed security, security and vulnerability management, IT operations management, identity protection, threat intelligence, data protection, SaaS security posture management, and AI powered workflow automation, and securing generative AI workload services, as well as security orchestration, automation, and response; and security information and event management, and log management services. It primarily sells subscriptions to its Falcon platform and cloud modules. The company has a strategic alliance with Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation to help enterprises secure artificial intelligence across its lifecycle, from the AI agents and models to the foundational infrastructure that supports the entire AI ecosystem. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
